---
id: re-evaluates-anomaly-flags-for-all-of-the-users-points
title: "Re-evaluates anomaly flags for all of the user's points"
description: "Clears existing anomaly flags and re-runs the anomaly detection pipeline against every point belonging to the user. A per-user lock prevents concurrent runs."
sidebar_label: "Re-evaluates anomaly flags for all of the user's points"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Re-evaluates anomaly flags for all of the user's points"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/points/reapply_anomaly_filter"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Clears existing anomaly flags and re-runs the anomaly detection pipeline against every point belonging to the user. A per-user lock prevents concurrent runs.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
